title: Compact context formatter for LLM consumption
acceptance_criteria: formatContextForLLM: SelectedContext -> Text (produces compact markdown representation)
~50 tokens per node, ~20 tokens per edge, ~100 tokens per community
Includes: community header with stats, key nodes (label + type + degree), key edges (source -> target [relation, confidence]), bridge nodes, suggested expansion paths
countContextTokens: Text -> Int (approximate token count for budget enforcement)
formatNodeCompact: Node -> Text, formatEdgeCompact: Edge -> Text (individual formatters)
Explicit exports, type signatures on all top-level definitions
